introSection: Jijig Galzo Holgana is a steel roller coaster located at Nairamdal Park in Ulaanbaatar, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia. The coaster spent some time standing but not operating, but was refurbished and reopened in 2010. The ride closed in 2022 or earlier.
fullText: Jijig Galzo Holgana is a steel roller coaster located at Nairamdal Park in Ulaanbaatar, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia. The coaster spent some time standing but not operating, but was refurbished and reopened in 2010. The ride closed in 2022 or earlier.
